summary: Completed comprehensive testing of WellTrack Phase 4: School Portal Adaptations. All 15 backend tests passed (100%). All 13 frontend features tested and verified (100%).
critical_code_review_comments: GET /api/public-settings correctly returns feature_flags, school_status, trial_expires_at from request.state.school
OAuth state storage in control_db.oauth_states includes tenant_slug field for multi-tenant resolution
OAuth callback resolves tenant from control_db using state param, NOT from middleware (correct design)
Feature flag filtering in DashboardLayout correctly hides nav items when flag is false
Trial expiry banner shows when school_status='trial' AND trial_expires_at is within 14 days
Trial banner dismiss button works correctly (state-based, not persisted)
SA School Detail page Feature Flags card shows all 4 toggles with correct data-testid attributes
Feature flag toggle via PUT /api/superadmin/schools/{schoolId} works correctly
Login flows work correctly for both demo and mooroopna schools
Note: google_auth_enabled (settings) vs feature_flags.google_auth are separate - initiation checks settings, callback checks feature flags
seed_data_creation: Modified mooroopna trial_expires_at to 2026-04-20 for testing trial banner (within 14 days). Temporarily toggled appointments flag to test nav filtering.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 4 School Portal Adaptations fully verified. Key features: (1) public-settings returns feature_flags, school_status, trial_expires_at; (2) OAuth state stored in control_db with tenant_slug; (3) Trial banner shows for trial schools within 14 days of expiry; (4) Feature flag filtering hides nav items; (5) SA Feature Flags card with toggle switches. Mooroopna school trial_expires_at was set to 2026-04-20 for testing.
passed_tests: GET /api/public-settings returns feature_flags, school_status, trial_expires_at for demo school (status=active, empty flags)
GET /api/public-settings returns correct feature_flags and trial status for mooroopna school (status=trial, flags include google_auth:false, appointments:true)
GET /api/auth/google stores OAuth state in control_db.oauth_states with tenant_slug field
GET /api/auth/callback does NOT depend on get_tenant_db - resolves tenant from control_db using state param
OAuth callback without state fails with redirect to login?error=auth_failed
OAuth callback with invalid state fails with redirect to login?error=auth_failed
OAuth callback with error param redirects with access_denied
Demo school email login works correctly (admin@test.com / password123)
Demo school invalid login returns 401
Mooroopna school email login works correctly (jane@mooroopna.edu.au / mooroopna123)
Mooroopna school invalid login returns 401
SA GET school detail includes feature_flags
SA PUT school updates feature_flags correctly
Trial expiry banner appears in dashboard when school status is trial and trial_expires_at is within 14 days
Trial expiry banner is dismissible with X button
Trial expiry banner does NOT appear when school is active (demo school)
Feature flag filtering hides nav items: when appointments flag is false, Appointments nav is hidden
Feature flag filtering shows nav items by default when flags are empty
SA School Detail page shows Feature Flags card with toggle switches for appointments, ai_suggestions, google_auth, saebrs_plus
SA Feature flag toggle saves changes via PUT /api/superadmin/schools/{schoolId}
Login flow works correctly for demo school with email/password
Login flow works correctly for mooroopna school with email/password
